description: Modify an existing Markup with new data for specified holder. This endpoint supports the Contract and Potential Change Order tools.  Access requires the user to have admin permissions for the relevant tool. Markups associated with contracts can be updated at any time. Markups on potential change orders can only be updated when the SOV (Schedule of Values) lines  are in an editable state

applies_to_all.description: Indicates if the markup applies to all change management items within the holder.

compound.description: Details of the compound calculations for the markup.

selections.description: Specifies which existing markups to include in the calculation when 'selective' compounding is chosen.

type.description:
Type of calculation for the markup:
- **Basic Calculation (null):** Percentage is multiplied by the line items that meet the application criteria.
- **Compounds all Above (above):** Percentage is m...

holder_id.description: Unique identifier for the markup holder.

markup_conditions.description: Conditions that determine how the markup will be applied to change management items within the holder.

id.description: Unique identifier for the markup condition.

match_type.description: Specifies whether the condition includes or excludes items.

wbs_segment_id.description: Unique identifier for the WBS Segment associated with the markup condition.  Supported segments include Cost Type and Cost Code.

markup_set.description:
Set of the markup.
- **Horizontal markup:** Calculates the markup amount on an individual line item.
- **Vertical markup:** Calculates the markup amount as a subtotal on all line items on a change ...

percentage.description: Percentage value of the markup. The default precision is 50.

position.description: Position of the markup in the markup set of the holder.  The default is the next available position, starting at 1.

prime_line_item_id.description: Unique identifier for the Prime Contract Line Item associated with the markup.  This ensures synchronization between the estimated value (without vertical markup) and  the revenue value (with verti...

project_id.description: Unique identifier for the project associated with the markup.

tax_code_ids.description: List of unique identifiers for tax codes associated with the markup. Applicable only when advanced calculations are enabled.

wbs_code.description: WBS Code to which the markup percentage will be applied on a project's budget.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WBS Code.
